subject: A hooded, cloaked figure crouched on the rooftop or upper ledge of a tiled urban building at night, watching unseen below
description: A robed assassin in a deep blue-violet hooded cloak crouches in concealment atop a steeply tiled rooftop, the cloak draped heavily around the body so the face is lost in shadow under the cowl. The figure is positioned in the foreground at the edge of a building, with hands or arms tucked under the garment. Behind and below, a stained-glass or leaded-glass window glows with cool blue light, suggesting an inhabited interior the watcher is surveilling. The architecture reads as a cathedral or upper-tier urban structure with gothic detailing. The palette is dominated by cold blues, indigos, and slate grays, lit by ambient moonlight or the diffused glow from the window. The mood is patient, predatory, and clandestine — a stalker waiting unseen.
foreground: hooded cloaked figure crouched on a tile roof edge
background: leaded glass window glowing with cool light, gothic urban architecture, night sky
